843C: INIT TERRAIN — Fills 256-byte terrain buffer with random unresolved heights (bit 7 set), then starts fractal midpoint displacement subdivision
8460: FRACTAL MAIN LOOP — Midpoint displacement: checks neighbors, computes average + random perturbation, places resolved heights. Uses recursion stack at $24BE
84B5: FRACTAL POP — Decreases recursion depth, pops from stack at $24BE or returns if depth exhausted
8526: PUSH SEED — Saves current terrain seed to recursion stack, increments depth counter
8059: GAMEPLAY VBI — Reset DLI counter, clear player sizes, set CHBASE, load sky/background colors from palette, handle attract mode color cycling, position missiles for crosshair, swap display lists based on game state, dispatch rendering pipeline
3C00: GAME ENTRY POINT — Initializes hardware, disables IRQ, sets up VBI/DLI vectors, configures PMBASE, CHBASE, SKCTL. Branches to title screen loop.
4940: CUSTOM IRQ HANDLER — Processes keyboard input via KBCODE, handles special key combinations, manages IRQEN
4CF1: DLI DISPATCHER — Reads DLI stage counter ($C8), indexes into jump table at $4DD6 to dispatch per-scanline color changes
4D0D: DLI STAGE 0 — Sky colors: sets horizon-area COLPF registers for sky gradient
4D20: DLI STAGE 1 — Terrain transition: switches colors from sky to ground palette, enables PRIOR=$11 for 5th player multicolor
4D41: DLI STAGE 2 — Ground colors: maintains terrain color registers during ground rendering
4D79: DLI STAGE 3 — HUD transition: switches to HUD colors, disables 5th player mode
52E7: LEVEL SETUP — Initializes level: loads terrain seed, configures difficulty parameters, resets enemy/pilot state
5997: BUILD SCREEN LINES — Constructs screen line address table: 45 entries for ANTIC mode D rows (96-byte stride)
5C88: INIT TERRAIN STRIPS — Initializes terrain strip rendering buffers for the 3D viewport columns
7B0A: BUILD LINE TABLE — Constructs rendering line table for terrain perspective
7C80: INIT GAME — Full game state initialization: clears variables, sets starting position, fuel, lives, shield. Calls level_setup
7DAF: WAIT 1 FRAME — Convenience: waits exactly 1 frame
7DB7: WAIT 2 FRAMES — Convenience: waits exactly 2 frames
7DBC: WAIT 5 FRAMES — Convenience: waits exactly 5 frames
7DC1: WAIT 10 FRAMES — Convenience: waits exactly 10 frames
7DC6: WAIT 20 FRAMES — Convenience: waits exactly 20 frames
82AA: DEFERRED VBI — Secondary VBI processing: game state updates, collision checks, timing
840A: TITLE SCREEN VBI — Handles attract mode cycling and title screen animations
9CCF: 16-BIT SIGNED MULTIPLY — Multiplies two 16-bit signed values, returns 16-bit result. Used by 3D transform pipeline
9DA7: 16-BIT DIVIDE — Divides 16-bit dividend by 16-bit divisor, returns quotient and remainder
9E8C: VERTEX TRANSFORM — Transforms 3D vertex coordinates through camera matrix: rotation + translation, outputs screen-space XY
A0DB: COMPUTE OFFSETS — Calculates screen buffer offsets for terrain column rendering based on viewer position and heading
A157: PROJECT X — Projects 3D X coordinate to screen column, applies perspective division
A356: RENDER TERRAIN — Main terrain rendering entry: iterates visible terrain columns, transforms heights to screen coordinates, calls fill routines
A690: DETECT PILOT — Scans terrain surface for downed pilot: checks pilot_map buffer at $0A00, compares with viewer position
B24D: RASTERIZE EDGE — Draws terrain edge (mountain silhouette): Bresenham-style line between two projected vertices
B3A7: EDGE MIDPOINT — Computes midpoint of terrain edge for subdivision, adds fractal perturbation
AF32: FILL COLUMN FAST — Fast vertical column fill for terrain: writes color bytes to screen memory using unrolled store sequence
0900: TERRAIN HEIGHT BUFFER — 256-byte ring buffer of fractal terrain heights for visible terrain columns
0A00: PILOT MAP — 256-byte buffer tracking downed pilot locations on terrain surface
24BE: TERRAIN RECURSION STACK — Used by fractal midpoint displacement for seed position stack
3800: CUSTOM CHARSET — 128 characters (1024 bytes), used for cockpit instruments and HUD text
4DD6: DLI DISPATCH TABLE — 8 pairs of lo/hi addresses for DLI stage handlers
B757: EDGE ADJACENCY TABLE — Lookup table for terrain edge neighbor relationships
